title: The Straw Hats Enter Arlong’s Shadow — Part 3
scene: On pages 9–12, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Luffy’s crew moves closer to Nami’s truth while Arlong’s crew treats the island as their possession.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: that thing was about to take a bite out of me too

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh, it's coming to sink the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: move over. I'll deal with him myself.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That was a nice little exercise.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
